name: swipe-bar-monorepo
description: Sliding barls like in a native app, built with React.

scripts.build: bun run build:lib && bun run build:docs
scripts.build:lib: tsc && vite build -c vite.lib.config.mts && cp README.md packages/library/README.md
scripts.build:docs: bun run --filter swipe-bar-docs build && cp packages/docs/public/.assetsignore packages/docs/dist/.assetsignore
scripts.npm: bun run build:lib && cd packages/library && npm publish --access public
scripts.npm:test: bun run build:lib && cd packages/library && npm pack --dry-run

author: Lucio D'Alessandro
